name: Double Delight
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine sugar, evaporated milk, butter, and salt. Bring to a boil.
2. Continue boiling for 6 minutes.
3. Remove from heat and stir in marshmallows, chopped nuts, and vanilla extract.
4. Once the marshmallows have melted, divide the mixture into two parts.
5. To one part, add semi-sweet chocolate chips and stir until melted.
6. Pour this layer into an 8-inch square buttered pan.
7. To the remaining mixture, add milk chocolate chips.
8. When the chocolate has melted, pour it over the first layer.
9. Chill the pan and cut into squares.
